generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor driven by a TMC4671‑Eval motor controller"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the end of the hoist for picking up containers"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder measuring hoist swing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTelemetryTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedTelemetryTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (data flow)
instance SwingAngleTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry stream of hoist swing angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTelemetryTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry stream of ambient wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedTelemetryTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane (Autodesk Fusion‑360 360° model)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the Trajectory Generator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEngineEnabler
]

instance PhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance OperationalTimeseriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series operational data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling & infrastructure)
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker mediates messaging between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService,
                    LoggingApplicationService,
                    TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                    SimulationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService,
                    GrafanaDashboardService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB stores time‑series operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerComposeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker & Docker‑Compose containerise each service as a Docker container"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService,
                    LoggingApplicationService,
                    GrafanaDashboardService,
                    TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                    SimulationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance PythonGantriLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "gantrylib Python module provides Control, Logging and HMI functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService,
                    LoggingApplicationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualises CAD geometry and telemetry dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboardService
]

instance TrajectoryEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Trajectory engine consumes kinematic model to generate optimal trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine runs physics‑based model for virtual execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation engine compares executed telemetry with simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine‑learning classifier analyses time‑series for fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services (declared as Service)
instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python‑based interface reads controller states and sensors, publishes telemetry via MQTT, and logs full crane state into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides TelemetryPublishAction,
                    StateLoggingAction
]

instance LoggingApplicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data logging service stores incoming telemetry into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service shows CAD geometry and live telemetry on Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal crane trajectories using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryInsight,
                    TrajectoryGenerationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs physics‑based simulation of crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates executed trajectories against simulated ones and classifies faults"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight,
                    FaultDetectionResultInsight,
                    ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance HumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "HMI enables operator control, displays insights and allows manual parameter updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorDecisionInsight,
                    ParameterUpdateAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance OptimizedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimised trajectory computed for the current pick‑and‑place task"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating deviation between executed and simulated trajectory"
]

instance FaultDetectionResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of fault detection classification from time‑series data"
]

instance StateLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that crane state has been successfully logged"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visualization of crane geometry and sensor telemetry"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Outcome of physics‑based simulation run"
]

instance OperatorDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight presented to operator for decision making (e.g., accept trajectory, adjust parameters)"
]

// C17: Actions
instance TelemetryPublishAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Publishes sensor telemetry to MQTT topics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Writes full crane state into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes trajectory generation algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates crane control parameters based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C19: Environment (system under study)
instance GantryCraneLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotorActuator,
                    HoistStepperMotorActuator,
                    ElectromagnetActuator,
                    SwingAngleEncoder,
                    Anemometer,
                    PhysicalCraneInterfaceService,
                    LoggingApplicationService,
                    GrafanaDashboardService,
                    TrajectoryGeneratorService,
                    SimulationService,
                    ContinuousValidationService,
                    HumanMachineInterfaceService
]

// C20: Supporting components (twinning process & evolution)
instance GantryCraneGitHubComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Public GitHub repository hosts all source code for reproducibility and evolutionary extensions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator and Control Application compute optimal motion commands and send set‑points to the Physical Crane Interface, which forwards them to the motor controllers; alerts from Continuous Validation Service are also sent to the operator via the Grafana dashboard."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A C4‑modelled architecture where the Physical Crane connects via a Python interface to a Control Application, Logging Application and HMI; the digital side consists of Dockerised Database, MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard, and three service containers (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) communicating over MQTT and sharing data through the database."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin spans design (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion‑360), manufacturing (physical crane built from the Bill‑of‑Materials), and operation (runtime sensor data, logging, validation and control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with simulated ones, computes distance metrics, checks against a predefined threshold, and triggers operator alerts when the threshold is breached, providing runtime fidelity assessment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication over TCP/IP LAN using MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for command and event signalling; sensor and state data are persisted via SQL queries to TimescaleDB; Python applications act as clients to both MQTT broker and database."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All Dockerised components (TimescaleDB, MQTT broker, Grafana) are launched with a single Docker‑Compose command on a personal computer; Python modules are installed via pip; the entire twin runs on the same host machine for simplicity."
]
